title: Bombay High Court judge duped of ₹6 lakh in online credit card reward points scam
description: A sitting judge of the Bombay High Court has lodged a police complaint after being duped of over ₹6 lakh in an online credit card fraud. The Cuffe Parade police in Mumbai have registered a first information report (FIR) under the Information Technology Act and the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.  According to FIR, the judge was attempting to redeem reward points through an HDFC Bank credit card on February 28 when the fraud occurred. While at home, the judge searched online for the
